content:
Thought: I need to search on Google for "How long does it take to visit Taipei Zoo?".
Action: Type [7]; How long does it take to visit Taipei Zoo?

Observation: please analyze the attached screenshot and give the Thought and Action. I've provided the tag name of each element and the text it contains (if text exists). Note that <textarea> or <input> may be textbox, but not exactly. Please focus more on the screenshot and then refer to the textual information.
[1]: <textarea> "How long does it take to visit Taipei Zoo?", "搜尋";	[6]: <button> "搜尋";	[7]: "快速設定", "設定";	[9]: "登入";	[10]: "全部";	[11]: "圖片";	[12]: "新聞";	[13]: "購物";	[14]: "地圖";	[15]: "短片";	[16]: "影片";	[17]: "更多";	[18]: "工具";	[19]: "Taipei zoo: hit it or miss it? My kids are 9 and 12 years ...";	[21]: "Facebook";	[22]: "› taiwantraveltips › posts";	[25]: "關於精選摘要";	[27]: "意見回饋";	[29]: "How long do you need for Taipei Zoo?";	[30]: "Should I go to the Taipei Zoo or Maokong first?";	[31]: "How long to spend on a Maokong Gondola?";	[32]: "How long does it take to see the National zoo?";	[33]: "意見回饋";	[34]: "Suggested Itinerary";	[36]: "Taipei Zoo";	[37]: "› ...";	[38]: "翻譯這個網頁";

Thought: The search result says "3-5 hour".
Action: ANSWER; Taipei Zoo may take 3-5 hours for visiting whole zoo.
